name: tabstack-schemas
description: Pre-defined extraction schemas for Tabstack's extract.json. Grab any file from this repo.

schemas.title: API Documentation Endpoint
schemas.description: Schema for individual API endpoint entries extracted from API documentation pages.

schemas.title: Company Profile
schemas.description: Schema for B2B company profile data including firmographics, funding, and contact info.

schemas.title: Funding Round
schemas.description: Schema for venture capital and private equity funding round records.

schemas.title: Press Release & News Mention
schemas.description: Schema for press releases and news mentions about B2B companies.

schemas.title: Product Changelog Entry
schemas.description: Schema for individual product changelog or release note entries.

schemas.title: SaaS Pricing Page
schemas.description: Schema for SaaS product pricing page data including plans, features, and pricing models.

schemas.title: Tech Stack
schemas.description: Schema for detected technology stack data for a company.

schemas.title: GitHub Repository
schemas.description: GitHub repository data for OSS research and competitive intel.

schemas.title: Package Registry Entry
schemas.description: Package from npm, PyPI, crates.io, etc.

schemas.title: Category Search Results
schemas.description: Schema for e-commerce category browsing or search results pages.

schemas.title: Grocery & CPG Product
schemas.description: Schema for grocery and consumer packaged goods (CPG) product listings.

schemas.title: Marketplace Seller Profile
schemas.description: Schema for seller or merchant profile pages on e-commerce marketplaces.

schemas.title: Product Listing
schemas.description: Schema for e-commerce product listings from marketplaces and direct retail sites.

schemas.title: Product Review
schemas.description: Schema for individual product reviews from e-commerce platforms.

schemas.title: Alternative Asset Listing
schemas.description: Listing for an alternative asset such as art, wine, watches, sports cards, sneakers, or other collectibles.

schemas.title: Angel & Seed Deal
schemas.description: Early-stage funding round announcement including angel, pre-seed, seed, convertible note, and SAFE deals.

schemas.title: Crypto Asset
schemas.description: Snapshot of market data for a cryptocurrency or digital asset.

schemas.title: Public Company Filing
schemas.description: SEC or equivalent regulatory filing from a publicly traded company, including financial statements and key metrics.

schemas.title: VC Portfolio Page
schemas.description: Venture capital or investment firm portfolio page listing companies and investment details.

schemas.title: Building Permit
schemas.description: Building or construction permit record from a municipal or county permitting authority.

schemas.title: Business Registration
schemas.description: Business entity registration record from a state secretary of state or equivalent authority.

schemas.title: Court Filing / Case
schemas.description: Court case record including parties, filings, and outcomes from a federal or state court docket.

schemas.title: Government Contract Award
schemas.description: Federal or state government contract, grant, or other award from USASpending.gov or equivalent.

schemas.title: Property Tax Record
schemas.description: Property tax assessment and payment record from a county assessor or tax collector.

schemas.title: Clinical Trial
schemas.description: Clinical trial registration and status information from ClinicalTrials.gov or equivalent registry.

schemas.title: Drug Formulary Entry
schemas.description: A drug entry from a health insurance plan formulary, including tier, coverage requirements, and pricing.

schemas.title: Medical Device Recall
schemas.description: Medical device recall notice from the FDA or equivalent regulatory authority.

schemas.title: Provider Directory Entry
schemas.description: Healthcare provider profile from an insurance network directory or physician finder.

schemas.title: Company Hiring Velocity
schemas.description: Schema for tracking a company's open job roles and hiring pace over time.

schemas.title: Executive Leadership Change
schemas.description: Schema for tracking executive and leadership role transitions at companies.

schemas.title: Job Posting
schemas.description: Schema for individual job listings extracted from job boards and company career pages.

schemas.title: Layoff Event
schemas.description: Schema for company layoff and workforce reduction event records.

schemas.title: Salary Data Point
schemas.description: Schema for individual salary data points from crowdsourced and published compensation sources.

schemas.title: Commercial Property
schemas.description: Schema for commercial real estate property listings including office, retail, and industrial.

schemas.title: Foreclosure & Auction Listing
schemas.description: Schema for foreclosure and property auction listings.

schemas.title: Property Sold History
schemas.description: Schema for historical property sale transaction records.

schemas.title: Rental Listing
schemas.description: Schema for residential rental property listings.

schemas.title: Residential Listing
schemas.description: Schema for residential real estate listings including homes, condos, and townhouses for sale.

schemas.title: Short-Term Rental
schemas.description: Schema for short-term vacation rental listings (Airbnb, VRBO, etc.).

schemas.title: News Article
schemas.description: Structured news article for LLM pipelines and media monitoring.

schemas.title: Social Profile
schemas.description: Platform social profile (LinkedIn company, Twitter/X, etc.)

schemas.title: Software Review
schemas.description: Software review from G2, Capterra, Trustpilot, etc.

schemas.title: Attraction & Experience
schemas.description: Tourist attraction or bookable travel experience listing from an OTA or attraction platform.

schemas.title: Flight Price Snapshot
schemas.description: Point-in-time price snapshot for a flight itinerary from an OTA or airline website.

schemas.title: Hotel Listing
schemas.description: Hotel or lodging property listing with pricing, amenities, and availability from a booking platform.

schemas.title: Restaurant Listing
schemas.description: Restaurant profile and details from a dining review platform or local business directory.
